title: 添加 RemoteFX 3D 显示控制器(旧机制)
title_en: Add a RemoteFX 3D Display Controller (Legacy Mechanism)
notes_en: This feature requires the host to have a RemoteFX physical GPU pool (Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor); without that hardware, a RemoteFX 3D display controller cannot be added. In this case AddResourceSettings returns 4096 (Job), the Job reaches a terminal JobState=10 (Exception) with ErrorCode=32773 (resource addition rejected), and the read-back controller count is 0.

RemoteFX vGPU has been deprecated and disabled by default since Windows Server 2019 / Windows 10 1809 (for security reasons). Modern GPU virtualization should use GPU partitioning (GPU-P, Msvm_PartitionableGpu) or DDA passthrough instead.

The class Msvm_Synthetic3DDisplayControllerSettingData still exists in the WMI schema and can be created with CreateInstance, but it is rejected by VMMS at run time. Key fields: ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic 3D Display Controller', MaximumMonitors, MaximumScreenResolution, VRAMSizeBytes.

After CreateInstance, ResourceSubType and ResourceType are empty, so ResourceSubType must be assigned explicitly; even with a correct assignment, the failure mode does not change on a host lacking a RemoteFX GPU (ErrorCode=32773).

General troubleshooting approach: when a write operation returns 4096, use Wait-Job2 to obtain the JobState; if the terminal state is 10, read ErrorCode and ErrorDescription through [wmi]$ra.Job to identify the cause. ErrorCode=32773 means 'cannot add resource', i.e., the resource type is not permitted on the current host or on that virtual machine.
output:
Physical3dGraphicsProcessor count = 0
Created VM: WMITEST_remotefx_3d
Set ResourceSubType = Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic 3D Display Controller
Default ResourceType = 
AddResourceSettings ReturnValue = 4096
Add job final JobState = 10
Job ErrorCode = 32773  ErrorDescription = 虚拟机 WMITEST_remotefx_3d 无法添加资源 (作业 ID 28B78809-...)
Synthetic3D controllers on VM after add = 0
ASSERT: RemoteFX 3D controller NOT added (legacy/deprecated, no physical RemoteFX GPU)
RESULT=UNSUPPORTED
Cleanup DestroySystem rv = 4096
Residual WMITEST count = 0
notes: 该特性需要主机具备 RemoteFX 物理 GPU 池(Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor);缺少该硬件时无法添加 RemoteFX 3D 显示控制器。此时 AddResourceSettings 返回 4096(Job),Job 终态 JobState=10(Exception),ErrorCode=32773(资源添加被拒),读回控制器数为 0。
RemoteFX vGPU 自 Windows Server 2019 / Windows 10 1809 起已弃用并默认禁用(出于安全考虑)。现代 GPU 虚拟化应改用 GPU 分区(GPU-P,Msvm_PartitionableGpu)或 DDA 直通。

类 Msvm_Synthetic3DDisplayControllerSettingData 仍存在于 WMI schema 中,可 CreateInstance,但会被 VMMS 在运行时拒绝。关键字段: ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic 3D Display Controller'、MaximumMonitors、MaximumScreenResolution、VRAMSizeBytes。
CreateInstance 后 ResourceSubType 与 ResourceType 为空,需显式赋值 ResourceSubType;即便正确赋值,在缺少 RemoteFX GPU 的主机上失败模式不变(ErrorCode=32773)。
通用排错方式: 写操作返回 4096 时用 Wait-Job2 获取 JobState;终态为 10 时,通过 [wmi]$ra.Job 读取 ErrorCode 与 ErrorDescription 定位原因。ErrorCode=32773 表示 'cannot add resource',即该资源类型在当前主机或该虚拟机上不被允许。
